# IERS Earth-orientation parameters — excerpt of finals2000A.all
# (finals.all.iau2000.txt), for the P4 real-time frame / EOP prediction budget.
#
# Source : https://datacenter.iers.org/data/latestVersion/finals.all.iau2000.txt
# Product: IERS Rapid Service / Prediction Centre, EOP 14 C04 / Bulletin A.
# Rows   : MJD 61173..61204 (2026-05-13 .. 2026-06-13), lifted verbatim. The first
#          20 rows are FINAL (Bulletin B present, columns 135-165); the last 12 are
#          PREDICTION-ONLY rows — the Bulletin B section is BLANK, exactly the state
#          that distinguishes a predicted row from a final row (parsed by
#          eop::parse_predicted / eop::is_prediction_row). These real predicted rows
#          exercise the Bulletin A predicted-column parser on genuine future rows; the
#          finals carry the Bulletin B pole columns for the polar-motion residual curve.
#          NOTE: a TRUE predicted-vs-final vintage difference needs an archived earlier
#          vintage of this product (these prediction rows have no eventual final yet in a
#          single fetch), so the multi-day growth uses the persistence predictor over the
#          real finals — an honestly-Modelled predictor with a real, measured error.
# Columns: fixed-width finals2000A — MJD [8..15], Bull.A PM-x [19..27],
#          Bull.A PM-y [38..46], Bull.A UT1-UTC [59..68], Bull.B PM-x [135..144],
#          Bull.B PM-y [145..154], Bull.B UT1-UTC [155..165]; see src/eop.rs.
# Comment lines (leading '#') and any non-data line are ignored by the parser.
